goal: Register agent-role-builder as a governed tool in bootstrap mode. Role creation is deferred.
business_context: agent-role-builder is the first tool in the ADF bootstrap sequence. It must be registered before it can create its own role (chicken-and-egg). This registration uses bootstrap mode (skip_build_agent_role=true) as a documented exception.
notes: Bootstrap mode: role creation deferred. Will be attached in subsequent step.

previous_contract.goal: Attach the governed role package to agent-role-builder, replacing the bootstrap registration.
previous_contract.business_context: agent-role-builder created its own role through 9 rounds of governed multi-LLM review. The role is now promoted. This update attaches it formally, completing the bootstrap sequence.
notes: Replaces bootstrap mode registration with governed role
Role was created by agent-role-builder itself (dog food)
Evidence: 4 runs, 9 review rounds, 24+ improvements applied
